Meet the Birds

About Us

From court partners to friends to business partners!

Joyce and Susie first met on the racquet courts and quickly became close friends. Before co-founding 2 BAM BIRDS, Susie spent many years in the finance industry, managing investments—and teams of analysts—at some of New York City's leading hedge funds. Joyce built her career at Bloomberg in the Training & Development department, where she discovered her passion for teaching and helping others learn.

Combining their professional backgrounds, love of teaching, and shared passion for American Mahjong, they created 2 BAM BIRDS. Their goal is simple: make learning mahjong approachable, engaging, and fun for everyone.

Both Joyce and Susie are competitive by nature, but they never lose sight of having a great time. When they're not teaching or playing mahjong, you'll almost always find them with a racquet in their hands and a hat on their heads!

📸Instagram: @2bambirds
✉️2BAMbirds@gmail.com

Lessons & Pricing

Find Your Perfect Lesson

Lessons available at your home, club, or designated location. Daytime and evening sessions available. Group sizes and scheduling subject to availability.

🦚

Group Lessons

3-8 players

Perfect for friends, neighbors, clubs, and social groups.

$50*
per person, per 2-hour session
4-session series required
Includes:
  • Mahjong fundamentals
  • Tile identification & Charleston strategy
  • Reading the card
  • Hand selection and game strategy
  • Guided practice play
Total cost: $200* per person for the complete 4-session series
Book Group — $200
NEW!
🦜

Beginner Essentials Program

3-8 players

Cover the basics with confidence!

$65*
per person, per 2-hour session
Two 2-hour sessions
Includes:
  • Tiles and their meanings
  • The Charleston
  • Dealer responsibilities
  • Game setup and flow
  • How to recognize a Mahjong hand
Total cost: $130* per person for the complete 2-session program

Does not include advanced strategy / tactics or shadow / companion play.

Book BE - $130
🦉

Instructor Play-In

3-6 players

Already know the basics and want guided practice with an instructor as your 4th?

$200
per 2-hour session
Must have min. 3 players
Includes:
  • Instructional play as needed
  • Strategy tips and coaching
  • Rules clarification
  • Hand selection guidance
Practice more. Improve faster. Have fun!
Book Play-In — $200
🕊️

Privates or Semi-Privates

For players already signed up for a lessons package

Personalized instruction tailored to your experience level and learning pace.

Pricing begins at
$100
per 90 minutes
Includes:
  • Customized instruction
  • Individual coaching and strategy
  • Focused gameplay and skill development
  • Flexible pacing based on player experience
Packages available. Ask for details!
2BAMbirds@gmail.com

Your info

Find a Sub ●

What do you need today?

You'll need to become a sub first (agree to be contacted, and add your info) before you can request one — that keeps the list a two-way street.

Become a Sub ●

You will be contacted by subs@2bambirds.com based on the criteria entered below. Keep an eye on your inbox so you don't miss playing opps!

🦚

You're on the list!

Thanks for becoming a sub. We'll reach out any time a group nearby needs an extra player.

Need a Sub ●

Requesting a sub generates an email from subs@2bambirds.com to interested players that contains YOUR contact and game INFO only. The sub can choose whether to reply back or not.

🀄

Request sent!

Everyone on the sub list who's opted in has been emailed. Fingers crossed!
